name: Reserve, voucher held against the cart
description: POST .../redeem with body { action: 'Reserve', reservedValue? }. Moves the voucher Issued → Reserved and returns a reservationKey the cartridge keeps on the basket to reinstate (release) or redeem it later. Response matches the documented Redeem Voucher Output 'Reserve' sample exactly.
notes: VoucherApplier.apply reads reservationKey and stashes it in basket.custom.loyaltyVoucherReservationKey. Reserving prevents the same voucher being applied to a second concurrent basket. A reserve failure must NOT break the basket, the adapter falls back to hold-the-code.
